title: stellaria longifolia f. ciliolata
intro: Stellaria longifolia f. ciliolata, also known as Chinese starwort or starwort, is a plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae, characterized by its creeping stems and star-shaped flowers. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stellaria longifolia f. ciliolata include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
